articles.description: Tottenham Hotspur want to convince Roberto de Zerbi to become their new permanent head coach, after the departure of interim boss Igor Tudor.
articles.title: Roberto de Zerbi: Tottenham want Italian as next permanent head coach

articles.description: Chief executive Vinai Venkatesham and sporting director Johan Lange must get the next Tottenham appointment correct or else they could follow Igor Tudor, writes Phil McNulty.
articles.title: Igor Tudor leaves Tottenham Hotspur - what next for Spurs?

articles.description: F1 finds itself in something of a tangled web as it tries to refine the new rules, improve safety and ensure the drivers are happy without compromising racing.
articles.title: Japanese Grand Prix: What can sport's bosses do to help keep Max Verstappen in F1?

articles.description: With one game to go until Thomas Tuchel picks his England World Cup squad, BBC Sport reporters choose their starting XI's for the summer. Who would you pick?
articles.title: England: BBC Sport choose their World Cup XIs - who would you pick?

articles.description: Having recovered from brain surgery and battled PTSD, an emotional Gary Woodland seals his first win in seven years at the Houston Open.
articles.title: Gary Woodland: US golfer wins Houston Open for first title since brain surgery

articles.description: Fans believe VAR is ruining goal celebrations and has not improved football since its introduction, according to a Football Supporters' Association survey.
articles.title: VAR: FSA survey finds 75% of Premier League fans against system

articles.description: Bayern Munich wary of Saudi Pro League clubs targeting Harry Kane, Bernardo Silva set to leave Manchester City, Inter Miami start talks with Manchester United's Casemiro, plus more.
articles.title: Football gossip: Kane, Silva, Lacroix, Suarez, Lewandowski, Kolo Muani, Casemiro

articles.description: Veron Mosengo-Omba, a controversial figure, leaves at a turbulent time for African football.
articles.title: Veron Mosengo-Omba: Caf general secretary resigns amid Afcon final fallout

articles.description: Lahore Qalandars are penalised for ball tampering during their Pakistan Super League defeat by Karachi Kings.
articles.title: PSL 2026: Lahore Qalandars penalised for ball tampering in defeat by Karachi Kings

articles.description: BBC Radio 5 Live F1 commentator Harry Benjamin rates how the drivers performed during the Japanese Grand Prix.
articles.title: Japanese Grand Prix: Harry Benjamin's driver ratings for Suzuka weekend
